MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
(415-659-5695) Ashley Shively appearing for Defendant/moving party.
No other appearances

Court reporter: Peggy Tsujimoto. CSR #5229. Telephone:(415)-828-1919. Email: p2gmoto@earthlink.net

Hearing is held. Ms. Shively stated that she was not notified by the plainitff that he contested to the tentative ruling. The Court stated that tentative ruling is hearing required so the the plaintiff could come into court and understand the importance of this motion. Ms. Shively reported that this motion was originally set in Dept. 302, that Dept. 302 transferred it to Dept. 501, that Timothy is a capable plaintiff and is aware of what tentative ruling is.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Defendants Motion For Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication is granted. Order for the same signed in open court. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong,(D501)
